title: Scandal Sheet
writer: Oliver H.P. Garrett, Vincent Lawrence, Max Marcin
actors: George Bancroft, Kay Francis, Clive Brook
plot: Scandal Sheet is a 1931 American crime film directed by John Cromwell and written by Oliver H.P. Garrett, Vincent Lawrence and Max Marcin. The film stars George Bancroft, Kay Francis, Clive Brook, Regis Toomey, Lucien Littlefield,...
